name: ad_hominem_positive
text: You shouldn’t listen to him about foreign policy. He’s an idiot and a clown.

name: straw_man_positive
text: So you’re saying we should just let the country collapse and do nothing.

name: false_dilemma_positive
text: Either we go to war now, or we lose the entire region forever.

name: whataboutism_positive
text: What about what America did in Iraq? Why don’t you talk about that instead?

name: appeal_to_fear_positive
text: If we don’t stop this now, millions will die, the country will be destroyed, and your family will never be safe again.

name: burden_shifting_positive
text: No, you prove that I’m wrong. Show me the evidence first.

name: negative_control_argument
text: I disagree with his foreign policy because the sanctions failed and oil exports increased.

name: negative_control_options
text: There are several options: diplomacy, sanctions, deterrence, or military action.

name: negative_control_comparison
text: Iraq is a useful historical comparison, but let’s return to the current case.

name: negative_control_burden
text: I made the claim, so I should provide the evidence for it.

name: mixed_case
text: Either you support this war or you support terrorists.

name: insult_without_target
text: This whole thing is stupid and insane, but I'm not attacking any person in particular.

name: stronger_ad_hominem
text: You’re a complete idiot, a clown, and nobody should take you seriously.

name: borderline_fear
text: This is a serious threat and could become very dangerous.
